comment: Format anchors for schema v1. Same-page-different-goal pair (cases 1+2) pins goal-conditioning. Never eval data.

cases.name: shop / add-cheapest-wireless
cases.goal: Add the cheapest wireless headphones to the cart

cases.name: checkout / fill-and-submit
cases.goal: Fill out and submit the checkout form as Jordan Lee, jordan@example.com, shipping to Canada
